title: Does submissions work?
content:
So I tried to make a submission, compliant with all the requirements (Internet off, etc.), and even though the notebook ran successfully, I got the Notebook threw Exception error. (logs show nothing relevant, no errors)

I wonder whether the problem is on the backend or not?

P.S. On public data everything works, and I have not changed the way I generate the submission.csv file since my last successfull submission.

comments.content: I seems traditional submission generation does not work; my notebook is even failing save/run

You should show particular cases that you face

E.x :

  • Which competitions?
  • Verify datastes yet?
  • What steps to do and where you face errors?
